case_title: SVETLANA KONOVITCH VS. TURKISH AIRLINES INC.

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL (AGENT FOR SERVICE OF PROCESS: CT CORPORATION SYSTEM) FILED BY PLAINTIFF KONOVITCH, SVETLANA AS TO DEFENDANT TURKISH AIRLINES INC.
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS. FILED BY DEFENDANT TURKISH AIRLINES INC.
FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 10/11/2022 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 681.53.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY KONOVITCH, SVETLANA AS TO DEFENDANT TURKISH AIRLINES INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-28-2019 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF APPEARED IN COURT LATE AFTER FINAL ROLL CALL. DEFENDANT TURKISH AIRLINES IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY IBRAHIM GUNER STATION MANAGER. DEFENDANT WAS DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AFTER FINAL ROLL CALL WITH NO APPEARANCE FROM PLAINTIFF AT THAT TIME. NO PROOF OF SERVICES WAS FILED. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
